ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
python_min:
- '3.10'

about.description:
OpenDataLoader PDF is an open-source PDF parser that extracts structured
Markdown, JSON (with bounding boxes), and HTML from any PDF. It features
deterministic local extraction with correct reading order, table detection,
heading hierarchy, and built-in AI safety filters. Hybrid mode adds OCR,
complex table extraction, formula extraction, and chart descriptions.
about.summary: PDF Parser for AI-ready data. Extract Markdown, JSON, and HTML from any PDF.

about.description:
OpenDataLoader PDF is an open-source PDF parser that extracts structured
Markdown, JSON (with bounding boxes), and HTML from any PDF. It features
deterministic local extraction with correct reading order, table detection,
heading hierarchy, and built-in AI safety filters. Hybrid mode adds OCR,
complex table extraction, formula extraction, and chart descriptions.
about.summary: PDF Parser for AI-ready data. Extract Markdown, JSON, and HTML from any PDF.

name: opendataloader-pdf
raw_meta_yaml:
context:
  version: "2.3.0"

package:
  name: opendataloader-pdf
  version: ${{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/o/opendataloader-pdf/opendataloader_pdf-${{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 4abb0737c70b6b6a42b04748945b598f3776d2af7bb26ed275ed1e1f26629ee2

build:
  noarch: python
  number: 0
  script: ${{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv --no-deps --no-build-isolation
  python:
    entry_points:
      - opendataloader-pdf = opendataloader_pdf.wrapper:main
      - opendataloader-pdf-hybrid = opendataloader_pdf.hybrid_server:main

requirements:
  host:
    - python ${{ python_min }}.*
    - pip
    - hatchling
  run:
    - python >=${{ python_min }}
    - openjdk >=11

tests:
  - python:
      python_version: ${{ python_min }}.*
      imports:
        - opendataloader_pdf
      pip_check: true
  - requirements:
      run:
        - python ${{ python_min }}.*
    script:
      - opendataloader-pdf --help

about:
  homepage: https://github.com/opendataloader-project/opendataloader-pdf
  summary: PDF Parser for AI-ready data. Extract Markdown, JSON, and HTML from any PDF.
  description: |
    OpenDataLoader PDF is an open-source PDF parser that extracts structured
    Markdown, JSON (with bounding boxes), and HTML from any PDF. It features
    deterministic local extraction with correct reading order, table detection,
    heading hierarchy, and built-in AI safety filters. Hybrid mode adds OCR,
    complex table extraction, formula extraction, and chart descriptions.
  license: Apache-2.0
  license_file:
    - src/opendataloader_pdf/LICENSE
    - src/opendataloader_pdf/THIRD_PARTY/
  documentation: https://opendataloader.org/docs/quick-start-python
  repository: https://github.com/opendataloader-project/opendataloader-pdf

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - killua156
    - mgorny
